text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 56 

DSNP_INTEGRATION_LEVEL 

LABEL: D-SNP integration level with FIDE/HIDE/CO values 

DESCRIPTION: Identifies the integration level of the D-SNP as Fully Integrated (FIDE), Highly Integrated (HIDE), or CO 
(Coordination Only) 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: CO = Coordination Only 
 FIDE = Fully Integrated 
 HIDE = Highly Integrated
